message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Crapchat user" as User1
actor "Another Crapchat user" as User2
rectangle "Crapchat REST API" as API
rectangle "Crapchat identity provider" as IdentityProvider
database "Crapchat storage" as Storage

rectangle "Search user" as SearchUser {
    User1 -> API : HTTP POST request with search query
    activate API
    API -> IdentityProvider : HTTP request with search query
    activate IdentityProvider
    IdentityProvider --> API : HTTP response with list of users
    deactivate IdentityProvider
    API --> User1 : HTTP response with array of users
    deactivate API
}

rectangle "Send follow request" as SendFollowRequest {
    User1 -> User1 : Clicks follow button
    User1 -> API : HTTP request with ID of the user to follow
    activate API
    API -> Storage : SQL insert query
    activate Storage
    Storage --> API : Success response
    deactivate Storage
    API -> User2 : Notify with follow request
    API --> User1 : HTTP OK response
    deactivate API
}

rectangle "Accept follow request" as AcceptFollowRequest {
    User2 -> API : HTTP request to accept
    activate API
    API -> Storage : SQL update query
    activate Storage
    Storage --> API : Success response
    deactivate Storage
    API --> User2 : HTTP OK response
    deactivate API
}

@enduml
```
